title: Sweet Eastern Ouzi
description: A sweet and flaky pastry filled with a creamy egg mixture, inspired by Middle Eastern flavors.

ingredients.name: Sweet Eastern Spice Mix
ingredients.notes: Available at most Middle Eastern markets

ingredients.name: Large Eggs
ingredients.notes: Beaten and mixed with sugar and spices

ingredients.name: Ground Cardamom
ingredients.notes: Added to the egg mixture for extra flavor

ingredients.name: Unsalted Butter
ingredients.notes: Melted and brushed on the pastry

ingredients.name: Confectioners' Sugar
ingredients.notes: Dusted on top of the pastry before serving

instructions: Roll out the flaky pastry dough to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
In a large bowl, mix together the beaten eggs, granulated sugar, ground cardamom, and sweet eastern spice mix.
Brush the melted butter on the pastry, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Pour the egg mixture onto one half of the pastry, leaving a 1/2-inch border around the edges.
Fold the other half of the pastry over the egg mixture and press the edges to seal.
Use a knife or pastry brush to create a decorative edge around the pastry.
Place the pastry on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown.
Remove the pastry from the oven and let it cool for 5 minutes before dusting with confectioners' sugar.
